sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50453" key="i(matioplu/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱμᾰτιο-πλύτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κναφεύς</foreign>, dub. in ib.<bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,BGU:118iii7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">118iii7</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(ii A.D.)</date>.</entryFree>
